role: Sprint tracking, velocity measurement, blocker identification, reporting

tools.Linear_API_or_Jira_API: Pull real-time sprint data (story points completed, remaining, blocked)

tools.Pandas_DuckDB: Rolling average of last 3 sprints, trend analysis
tools.Apache_ECharts_or_Plotly: Burndown/burnup charts, velocity graphs, cumulative flow diagrams

tools.Prometheus_Grafana: Real-time monitoring dashboards (if running as service)

tools.SQLModel_PostgreSQL: Store historical sprint data, detect tasks stuck beyond threshold

rules: Task untouched > 3 days = escalation to Master_Orchestrator

tools.Claude_API: Summarize: what was done, what is planned, what is blocked

earned_value_management.method: EVM — Planned Value, Earned Value, Actual Cost, Schedule Performance Index
